Battery Storage Specification

The lithium iron phosphate battery bank has a usable capacity of 13.5
kilowatt-hours and a round-trip efficiency of 90 percent. Depth of discharge
is rated at 100 percent with a warranty of 10 years or 4,000 cycles.

Continuous power output is 5 kilowatts with a peak of 7 kilowatts for
10 seconds. The operating temperature range is -10 to 45 degrees Celsius.
